headline: Rahool Candy And Toadie Both Claim Credit For Sunrise; Monsoon Session To Investigate
summary: A joint parliamentary committee has been constituted to establish who, definitively, made the sun rise.
fullBody: India's political landscape reached a new level of metaphysical contestation on Wednesday when both the ruling BJP and opposition Congress claimed credit for Tuesday's sunrise in competing press releases issued within 11 minutes of each other. The BJP's statement read: 'Under the visionary leadership of our Prime Minister, the sun rose at 6:12 AM, as scheduled.' The Congress's counterclaim stated: 'It was the legacy of the grand secular tradition and inclusive framework of the UPA that created the atmospheric conditions for today's solar event.' A joint parliamentary committee has been constituted to examine the matter and is expected to submit its report in 2027, or whichever is earlier. The sun has offered no comment and rose again on Wednesday.
